scope_goal: Harden context basket and vault persistence recovery so valid local state is salvaged and rewritten safely, then emit a review packet for the actual branch head with accurate ownership and budget accounting.
tasks_completed: Hardened context basket persistence to quarantine unreadable files, salvage valid item IDs, and rewrite normalized state after recovery.
Hardened vault state persistence to recover from corrupt primary/tmp/backup files while preserving safe lock behavior.
Accepted metadata-only corruption in persisted basket and vault payloads so valid core state is salvaged and rewritten instead of discarded.
Added focused recovery tests for mixed invalid basket entries and legacy basket payload salvage.
Added explicit metadata-only corruption coverage for both context basket and vault persistence paths.
Regenerated the handoff metadata for the actual branch head with accurate budget accounting, files changed, gate outcomes, and ownership notes.
roadmap_items: Milestone 1 - Bootstrap Flow Stabilization: context basket and vault persistence hardening.
kickoff_budget_note: Thread Kickoff Template budget applied: task budget `8`, time budget `45m`, size limits `<=12 files` and `<=500 net LOC`, max fix attempts per failing gate `2`. Tasks completed: `6 of 8`. Budget status: within limits at `8` files changed and `299` net LOC versus `codex/integrator`; this fix pass stayed within the `45m` active-coding window and did not exceed the `2`-attempt gate-fix limit.
approved_exception_note: Ownership note: lane-owned runtime edits stay within `src/qual/context/**` and `src/qual/storage/**`; the only approved non-owned product/test change is `tests/unit/test_context_storage_recovery.py` for focused recovery coverage. Handoff-support artifacts also changed in `.codex/lane_meta/feat-context-storage.json`, `.codex/packet_planner/state.json`, `codex_packet_handoff/tools/init_lane_meta.py`, and `codex_packet_handoff/tools/planner.py`. No shared-by-approval source files or integrator-locked files were edited.
